title: Full Stack Engineer

Exposure to trading, pricing, or risk platforms. Interest in AI or emerging technologies in trading. Requirements: 3+ years of work experience with AWS. 3+ years of experience in IT. 3+ years of work experience with Python. 3+ years of work experience with React.js.

title: Lead Software Engineer
jd_text: About the job                                                               Electronic circuit boards are at the core of current and future inventions - mobile phones, augmented reality, autonomous vehicles and spacecrafts. Yet today designing an electronic circuit board is an extremely manual, long and tedious process. At Circuit Mind we believe that this is wrong and we are on a mission to fix it, triggering the future of hardware design.Taking inspiration from the integrated circuit workflow (hardware description language, logic synthesis, automated place and route), we are creating an entirely new software engine for circuit boards, that takes as inputs the requirements of a circuit board and automatically outputs a complete design, ready for manufacture.As a Lead Software Engineer, you’ll take full ownership of the development of large pieces of functionality across the back-end stack of Circuit Mind's products. You will collaborate closely with a team of other lead engineer-level individual contributors.Responsibilities      Collaborate with the product team and the hardware team to understand the problems of hardware engineering teams.Plan, design, develop, test and iterate on the software solutions to those problems, accounting for functional and non-functional requirements.Co-design, pair on, and review the development work of other lead software developers.The above apply to the entire company's backend code base: data models, algorithms, data pipelines, infrastructure, APIs, complex database queries, ML models.Learn, use, and improve best practices and processes for high-quality software development. Our technology stack includes Python 3.11, PostgreSQL, Django, mypy, GraphQL, Docker, Redis, Typescript, React, Apollo.Qualifications      5+ years of professional software development experience.2+ year of professional experience in Python.Strong communication and team-work skills.Experience working in an agile software development environment. Nice to haves      Experience in a tech lead position.An interest in electronic engineering. jd_text: First and most importantly: our mission is to bring transparency and clarity to the world's data. Our platform, FiftyOne, is where AI work happens. Our engineering leadership subscribes to “servant leadership”: helping to support you, unblock you, and empower you – not micromanage you. What you will do Collaborate on architecting, developing, and scaling new and existing functionality in the open source and enterprise versions of FiftyOne. title: Staff Fullstack Software Engineer
jd_text: About Bestow Life insurance is one of the world's most important products. It's also one of the hardest to build, distribute, and modernize. Bestow exists to change that. Bestow is a leading vertical technology platform serving some of the largest and most innovative life insurers. Our platform unifies the fragmented, legacy value chain, enabling carriers to launch products in weeks instead of years. Carriers choose us to scale and operate at unprecedented speed, powered by AI and automation. Bestow isn't selling policies. We're building the infrastructure that helps an entire industry move faster, reach more people, and deliver on its promise. Backed by leading investors (Goldman Sachs, Hedosophia, NEA, Valar, 8VC) and trusted by major carriers, Bestow is powered by a team that moves with precision, purpose, and heart. If you want to help reimagine a centuries-old industry with lasting impact, join us. Bestow offers flexible remote/hybrid work, meaningful benefits, equity, and substantial growth opportunities. Bestow participates in the E-Verify Program. About The Team Labs is a team within Bestow incubating experimental products at the frontier of insurance technology and AI. We are full-stack with the autonomy to explore greenfield opportunities—and successful products are integrated into Bestow's core platform. Our focus is on meeting the needs of our enterprise customers and growing user base to transform how millions of people access life insurance. We move fast, embrace ambiguity, and use AI as a force multiplier. Our role is to validate ideas quickly, demonstrate what's possible, and inform production roadmaps with working prototypes. About The Role We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer who thrives in rapid-prototyping environments and leverages AI to build faster and smarter. You'll work at the intersection of product innovation, domain expertise, and cutting-edge technology—turning ambiguous ideas into working demos that can either be hardened for production or inform the next generation of our platform. This isn't about writing perfect code. It's about shipping working solutions quickly, iterating based on feedback, and knowing when to refactor vs. when to ship. You'll work alongside product managers, solution architects, actuaries, and domain experts to validate hypotheses and push the boundaries of what's possible in insurance technology.
